message:
Running command: cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526
# Kill any hanging vvp processes
pkill -9 vvp 2>/dev/null
pkill -9 iverilog 2>/dev/null

# Run debug runner with 30s per simulation timeout, no more
python3 /tmp/debug_runner.py 2>&1 &
BGPID=$!
# Wait 120s then collect output
sleep 120
kill $BGPID 2>/dev/null
wait $BGPID 2>/dev/null
echo "done"
